# Security Policy

Symly runs entirely on your Mac and never opens a network connection. If you do
find a security issue, please report it privately rather than in a public issue.

## Reporting a vulnerability

Use GitHub's private reporting: open the **Security** tab of this repository and
click **Report a vulnerability**. If you would rather email, write to
**symly@brandoniben.com**.

Please include enough detail to reproduce the problem. You will get a response as
soon as possible.

## Supported versions

The latest released version receives security fixes. Symly is provided as-is
under the Apache License 2.0, with no warranty (see [LICENSE](../LICENSE)).
